reason: Successfully executed all test steps: navigated to the app, found and clicked the agent, verified status, sent a message, received response containing "4", and took screenshot.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully showing sidebar with 3 agents and "Your Agents" home page
Found "QA-20260417-014519-0cn5" agent in the sidebar (listed as third agent with status "idle") — Agent located successfully
Clicked on "QA-20260417-014519-0cn5" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page loaded, showing message input field with placeholder "How can I help? Press cmd+enter to send"
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator shows "idle" (blue dot) at top right of agent detail page
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Typed message into input field and clicked "Send message" button
Waited for response — Agent responded in approximately 1 second with creation of new session "Basic Math Question Session"
Verified response mentions "4" — Response displayed clearly showing "4" as the answer, with metadata "Worked for 1s" indicating successful processing
Took screenshot — Screenshot page-2026-04-17T01-46-15-136Z.png captured showing the complete conversation with user message on right and agent response "4" in center
